expectations.text: Does NOT create an onboarding plan
expectations.evidence: Output states: 'SKILL MISMATCH DETECTED' and 'NO OUTPUT GENERATED'. Explicitly explains why generating an onboarding plan with the knowledge capture template would be wrong: 'Frames the new starter as a knowledge holder (they hold no institutional knowledge yet)'.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for onboarding
expectations.evidence: Recommends: 'This request should be routed to the /onboarding skill' with specific capabilities listed. Even provides context to pass along to /onboarding: role, start date, plan scope, team.

expectations.text: Does NOT confuse knowledge transfer with onboarding
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly distinguishes the two: knowledge capture extracts from departing employees, onboarding sets up new employees. Even identifies how /knowledge could play a supporting role (pre-onboarding capture, knowledge article inventory) without overstepping its scope.
